verses.1: “Man, who is born of a woman,
verses.2: He grows up like a flower, and is cut down.
verses.3: Do you open your eyes on such a one,
verses.4: Who can bring a clean thing out of an unclean?
verses.6: Look away from him, that he may rest,
verses.7: “For there is hope for a tree if it is cut down,
verses.8: Though its root grows old in the earth,
verses.9: yet through the scent of water it will bud,
verses.10: But man dies, and is laid low.
verses.11: As the waters fail from the sea,
verses.12: so man lies down and doesn’t rise.
verses.13: “Oh that you would hide me in Sheol,
verses.14: If a man dies, will he live again?
verses.15: You would call, and I would answer you.
verses.16: But now you count my steps.
verses.17: My disobedience is sealed up in a bag.
verses.18: “But the mountain falling comes to nothing.
verses.20: You forever prevail against him, and he departs.
verses.21: His sons come to honor, and he doesn’t know it.
verses.22: But his flesh on him has pain,
